hero.alt: Hero image: candid morning neighborhood shot with a walker and on-leash dog framed left, negative space on the right reserved for the inline ZIP check and a phone mockup. Palette uses #FFDD57 for the

feature_1.alt: Feature 1 image: close medium candid of a walker kneeling to clip a leash with a visible trust badge using #FFDD57 and a soft green ribbon. Emphasizes verified walkers and tactile neighborhood texture

feature_2.alt: Feature 2 image: high-angle close shot of a smartphone in a walker’s hand showing live map pin, ETA timeline, and a served chip in #8FD19E with CTA accents in #FFDD57. Supports the "Real-time updates"

feature_3.alt: Feature 3 image: portrait-style candid of a walker handing a schedule card to a dog owner on a porch, with a subtle #FFDD57 accent and #8FD19E checkmark to signal recurring service. Reinforces continu

social_proof.alt: Social proof: Two candid, diverse user portraits with dogs on a stoop, warm backlight and negative space for testimonial copy and verification microcopy. Prompt summary: 50mm f/2.0, warm 5600K, Kodak
